title: Bolsius - True Joy - Scented Bouquet - Burgundy - Floral Blessings - 80ml - Lasts up to 8 Weeks - Natural Extracts - Herbal Formula
features: Take some time for yourself with our Bolsius True Joy Floral Blessings scented bouquet and discover this irresistible wellness scent of a garden full of fragrant flowers that helps you relax. This scented bouquet guarantees the purest fragrance diffusion for up to 8 weeks, thanks to our ScentFusion technology. Our technology is a unique combination of a sophisticated fragrance blend and a herbal formula that ensures a perfect olfactory experience.

Floral Blessings is a cheerful scent of orange blossom, jasmine, rose and juicy orange on a musk base. Discover this irresistible wellness scent of a garden full of fragrant flowers that helps you relax!
The composition was made from natural extracts. The subtle fragrance gradually spreads throughout the room and persists for up to 8 weeks. Enjoy a pure and intense olfactory experience in your home

Be enchanted by True Joy's rich scents, capturing the beauty of nature through vibrant colors, captivating shapes and alluring fragrances. Treat yourself to a unique blend of our fragrances, elegantly presented - a perfect gift for everyone. Designed with ScentFusion technology, we guarantee the purest fragrance and the release of the cleanest fragrance.

Since 1870, Bolsius has been producing high-quality candles and fragrances with which you create an atmosphere of comfort and well-being in your home. We do it with passion, know-how and respect for people and the planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candle light and fragrances that awaken your senses. So that every moment is special. For you and everyone around you.
